query:
SELECT 
  id,
  orderNo,
  customerName,
  salespersonId,
  trafficSource,
  courseAmount,
  paymentAmount,
  teacherFee,
  transportFee,
  partnerFee,
  paymentChannel,
  channelOrderNo,
  classDate,
  deliveryCity,
  deliveryTeacher,
  deliveryCourse,
  status,
  notes
FROM orders 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 50;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT 
  id,
  orderNo,
  customerName,
  salespersonId,
  trafficSource,
  courseAmount,
  paymentAmount,
  teacherFee,
  transportFee,
  partnerFee,
  paymentChannel,
  channelOrderNo,
  classDate,
  deliveryCity,
  deliveryTeacher,
  deliveryCourse,
  status,
  notes
FROM orders 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 50;
